title: dortmanna corymbosa
intro: Dortmanna corymbosa, also known as the common water plantain, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the family Alismataceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat skin irritations, wounds, and infections due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dortmanna corymbosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and prevent the formation of scar tissue. Herbal preparations of Dortmanna corymbosa can be made into poultices, ointments, or infusions, and are often used topically to treat various skin conditions and injuries.
